channel.title: Public Debt on Roshan Rai
channel.description: Recent content in Public Debt on Roshan Rai

item.title: Nepal's Public Debt: Should We be Worried?
item.description: The rapid rise of public debt of Nepal has worried the policymakers, bureaucrats, economists and the public like. Public debt to GDP ratio was around 15-20% of GDP pre-earthquake period has reached 44% in 2025.
